Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14823 0 0}What brings you to the nurse's office? Eeeheehee...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}Do keep in mind that you are interrupting my, ahem... "scholarly pursuits."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Hm? What's this? You seem healthy enough. My eyes cannot be deceived![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1081 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14803 0 0}I don't need students slouching around my office. Out you go! Shoo, shoo![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I guess he'll only see me if I'm feeling tired.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mr. Edogawa might respond differently if[n]I visit him the day after I explore Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}
